3334350.name: Mech Log Zero
3334350.description:
Mech Log Zero is a shooter akin to games from the old-school PS1 and N64 eras.

Swap between a first-person Pilot view and a third-person view when controlling the Mech.

Use the synergy between the Pilot and the Mech to explore and prevail in Mordaro´s many interconnected Megastructures.

GAMEPLAY-

Use the Mech to destroy colossal machines part by part, or use your skills as the pilot to find an entrance through the colossus, enter their central core, destroy it, and escape with the Mech before the giant machine explodes.

Exit the Mech as the pilot and explore the zones the Mech can´t access, or find a breakable secret wall so the mech shots can enter the zone from outside.

Find ways to move around Mordaro´s layers using the new upgrades and weapons scattered across the megastructures.

New weapons not only serve as a way to attack, but some of them will offer you new ways to move around.

STORY-

Dehka and Alyssa´s new gig has given them the power to hack into a Machine, deep inside one of Mordaro´s lower layers.

You take on the role of Dehka, who at the same time controls the Machine Alyssa has called "The Pilot".

It is your job to retrieve LifeSeeds for your people's needs using this machine...

They will quickly find, however, that the lower layers aren´t as lifeless as they thought they would be.

You´re far away from any danger, right?
